data.title: BTC Accumulation Signals Strong Support, but Market Awaits Key Breakout
data.description:
TL;DR Large investors (whales) have accumulated over 150,000 BTC, reinforcing a key support range between $97,500 and $99,999, while small traders are exiting. Bitcoin is forming an ascending wedge pattern and needs to surpass $100,000 to initiate a 7% rally, reaching $106,100, which is crucial for its trend. If it fails to break above $100,000, ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/btc-accumulation-signals-strong-support-but-market-awaits-key-breakout/

data.title: BTC falls below 98,000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC fell below 98,000 USDT and is now at 97,980 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 0.94%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: U.S. House Committee to Hold Hearing on Cryptocurrency Banking Restrictions
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. House Financial Services Committee's Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations is scheduled to hold a hearing on February 6 at 2:00 PM Eastern Time (February 7 at 3:00 AM UTC+8). The hearing, titled 'Choke Point 2.0: How the Biden Administration is Suppressing Cryptocurrency,' will focus on the banking service restrictions faced by the cryptocurrency industry. Witnesses include Austin Campbell, Paul Grewal, Fred Thiel, and Shayna Olesiuk. The discussion is expected to cover the attitudes of financial regulatory agencies towards crypto enterprises and the impact on the industry's development.

data.title: Coinbase International will launch BERA perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase International Station announced on the X platform that Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced will launch BERA perpetual contracts, and the BERA-PERP market will be opened at or after 17:00 UTC on January 6, 2025.

data.title: Grayscale transfers 2,593 ETH to Coinbase Prime hot wallet address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Arkham monitoring, about 2 minutes ago, Grayscale transferred 2,593 ETH worth 7.21 million US dollars to the Coinbase Prime hot wallet address through its Coinbase Prime Deposit address. It is reported that these ETH were transferred out through the Grayscale Ethereum ETF.

data.title: The U.S. House of Representatives will hold a hearing on "How the Biden administration will suppress cryptocurrencies"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. House Financial Services Committee's Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee will hold a hearing at 14:00 Eastern Time on February 6 (3:00 a.m. Beijing Time on February 7) on the theme of "Choke Point 2.0: How the Biden Administration Cracks Down on Cryptocurrencies," focusing on the banking service restrictions facing the crypto industry. Witnesses include Austin Campbell, Paul Grewal, Fred Thiel, and Shayna Olesiuk, and are expected to cover the attitudes of financial regulators toward crypto companies and their impact on the development of the industry.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has liquidated 55.0223 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Coinglass data, the total amount of liquidation in the past 4 hours was 55.0223 million US dollars, of which long orders were 43.2082 million US dollars and short orders were 11.8142 million US dollars. In addition, the amount of liquidation of BERA reached 11.1861 million US dollars.

data.title: BitMart launches BERA perpetual contract
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch the Berachain (BERA) perpetual contract at 23:00 (UTC+8) on February 6, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 20 times, and open the BERA/USDT trading pair.
Berachain is a high-performance EVM-identical layer 1 (L1) blockchain that uses liquidity proof (PoL) consensus to coordinate network-level liquidity and security, built on a modular evm-centric consensus client framework called BeaconKit.

data.description:

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes rose at the opening, and Coinbase rose 1.58%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 88 points, the S&P 500 rose 0.23%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.16%. Coinbase rose 1.58%, Roblox (RBLX.N) fell 20%, and the company's daily active users in the fourth quarter were lower than expected.
